Spooner Labs

Experiments and thoughts in systems, technology, organizations, and whatever else is worth exploring.

Browse experiments About this site

Recent experiments

Florida Politics

An interactive exploration of how Florida has shifted politically over time. Tracks gubernatorial primary and general election results by county alongside legislative party balance from 1992 to 2024.

Live Data / Politics View → GitHub →

Portuguese Phrases for Tidbyt

A Tidbyt app that cycles through European Portuguese phrases and words on the device display. Built for daily passive exposure to the language.

Live Tool

Where Now?

A random food and trip generator for the Lisbon area. Useful when you can't decide where to eat or what to do next.

Live Tool View → GitHub →
